ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Comedia del sig. Massimo Faroni. Gentilhuomo, & Academico Mantovano
ItacWorkItem.Content: Comedy in five acts, in prose, with interludes in verse
ItacWorkItem.Notes: `Academico Mantovano` on the title page most likely refers to Farroni`s membership of the Accademia degli Invaghiti, the most prosperous academy in Mantua, in which he played an active role.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
